CustomField.description: Check this box to include this invoice line item in the unearned/deferred revenue calculation. This line item amount will be used to calculate the unearned revenue for each month, particularly for rent slips that span two months.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Check this box to include this invoice line item in the unearned/deferred revenue calculation. This line item amount will be used to calculate the unearned revenue for each month, particularly for rent slips that span two months.
CustomField.label: Include in Unearned Revenue Calculation?
